steps.title: Focus on the study findings
steps.content: The text describes an experiment comparing seeds planted in lunar regolith with seeds planted in terrestrial soil. It then reports the results: all seeds germinated, but the regolith-grown plants showed stunted roots and stress indicators.

steps.title: Reject unsupported purposes
steps.content: Choice A invents a question about how lunar regolith resembles terrestrial soil. Choice B turns the text into a comparison of assessment methods. Choice C contradicts the successful germination. The text's purpose is to discuss findings about plant exposure to lunar soil conditions. The answer is D.
